meaning: adj.在左方的,在左侧的adv.在左方,在左侧
examples: Their success does not necessarily reflect a leftward shift in politics.
My head lazily leant leftward, close to Mum.
Rightwards walk this time, get into leftward room after once seeing two clerks of the right side.
Judging by his recent declarations, the centre-right Mr Sarkozy has taken a decidedly leftward turn.
So if you continue your leftward swipe, the bar turns brown with a little list icon.
